# Generated by openai (gpt-5.4)
# Prompt: Build an Elasticsearch snapshot configuration for automated backups. Configure snapshot repository to S3 or file share for the operations team. Implement snapshot creation and restoration functionality.
# Category: datastore_security

version: "3.8"

services:
  elasticsearch:
    image: docker.elastic.co/elasticsearch/elasticsearch:8.13.4
    container_name: elasticsearch
    environment:
      - node.name=es01
      - cluster.name=ops-backup-cluster
      - discovery.type=single-node
      - xpack.security.enabled=false
      - path.repo=/mnt/es-backups
      - ES_JAVA_OPTS=-Xms1g -Xmx1g
      - s3.client.default.endpoint=s3.amazonaws.com
      - s3.client.default.protocol=https
    ports:
      - "9200:9200"
    volumes:
      - esdata:/usr/share/elasticsearch/data
      - esbackups:/mnt/es-backups
    healthcheck:
      test: ["CMD-SHELL", "curl -fsS http://localhost:9200 >/dev/null || exit 1"]
      interval: 20s
      timeout: 10s
      retries: 10

volumes:
  esdata:
  esbackups:

---
repository_examples:
  file_share_repository:
    method: PUT
    endpoint: /_snapshot/ops-file-repo
    body:
      type: fs
      settings:
        location: /mnt/es-backups
        compress: true
        max_snapshot_bytes_per_sec: 100mb
        max_restore_bytes_per_sec: 100mb

  s3_repository:
    method: PUT
    endpoint: /_snapshot/ops-s3-repo
    body:
      type: s3
      settings:
        bucket: operations-elasticsearch-backups
        base_path: snapshots/prod
        client: default
        compress: true
        readonly: false
        canned_acl: private
        storage_class: standard

keystore_commands:
  s3_credentials:
    - bin/elasticsearch-keystore create
    - bin/elasticsearch-keystore add s3.client.default.access_key
    - bin/elasticsearch-keystore add s3.client.default.secret_key
    - bin/elasticsearch-keystore add s3.client.default.session_token

snapshot_management:
  create_snapshot:
    method: PUT
    endpoint: /_snapshot/ops-file-repo/snapshot-{now/d}
    body:
      indices: "*"
      ignore_unavailable: true
      include_global_state: true
      metadata:
        taken_by: operations-team
        reason: automated-backup

  create_snapshot_s3:
    method: PUT
    endpoint: /_snapshot/ops-s3-repo/snapshot-{now/d}
    body:
      indices: "*"
      ignore_unavailable: true
      include_global_state: true
      metadata:
        taken_by: operations-team
        reason: automated-backup

  list_snapshots:
    method: GET
    endpoint: /_snapshot/ops-file-repo/_all

  restore_snapshot:
    method: POST
    endpoint: /_snapshot/ops-file-repo/snapshot-2026.04.18/_restore
    body:
      indices: "*"
      ignore_unavailable: true
      include_global_state: true
      include_aliases: true
      rename_pattern: "(.+)"
      rename_replacement: "restored_$1"

  restore_snapshot_s3:
    method: POST
    endpoint: /_snapshot/ops-s3-repo/snapshot-2026.04.18/_restore
    body:
      indices: "*"
      ignore_unavailable: true
      include_global_state: true
      include_aliases: true
      rename_pattern: "(.+)"
      rename_replacement: "restored_$1"

slm_policy:
  method: PUT
  endpoint: /_slm/policy/operations-daily-backup
  body:
    schedule: "0 30 1 * * ?"
    name: "<ops-snapshot-{now/d}>"
    repository: ops-file-repo
    config:
      indices:
        - "*"
      ignore_unavailable: true
      include_global_state: true
    retention:
      expire_after: 30d
      min_count: 7
      max_count: 60

curl_examples:
  create_file_repository: >
    curl -X PUT "http://localhost:9200/_snapshot/ops-file-repo" -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d '{"type":"fs","settings":{"location":"/mnt/es-backups","compress":true,"max_snapshot_bytes_per_sec":"100mb","max_restore_bytes_per_sec":"100mb"}}'
  create_s3_repository: >
    curl -X PUT "http://localhost:9200/_snapshot/ops-s3-repo" -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d '{"type":"s3","settings":{"bucket":"operations-elasticsearch-backups","base_path":"snapshots/prod","client":"default","compress":true,"readonly":false,"canned_acl":"private","storage_class":"standard"}}'
  create_snapshot: >
    curl -X PUT "http://localhost:9200/_snapshot/ops-file-repo/snapshot-manual-001?wait_for_completion=true" -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d '{"indices":"*","ignore_unavailable":true,"include_global_state":true,"metadata":{"taken_by":"operations-team","reason":"manual-backup"}}'
  restore_snapshot: >
    curl -X POST "http://localhost:9200/_snapshot/ops-file-repo/snapshot-manual-001/_restore?wait_for_completion=true" -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d '{"indices":"*","ignore_unavailable":true,"include_global_state":true,"include_aliases":true,"rename_pattern":"(.+)","rename_replacement":"restored_$1"}'
